# Item Pipeline

## When to Use
- Adding new item types.
- Expanding equipment stats or rarity tables.
- Updating inventory/equip data contracts.

## Procedure
1. Define schema and required fields.
2. Create or map stable item IDs.
3. Map equipment slots and visual labels.
4. Verify save/load compatibility.
5. Run validation checklist.

## References
- [Item template](./assets/item-template.md)
- [Validation checklist](./assets/item-validation-checklist.md)
